observations: Empty ChromaDB collections: healing_knowledge, experiential_journal, episteme_research, enterprise_knowledge, critic, unresolved_tensions, aesthetic_patterns, scope_reflections, introspector, reflections_researcher, reflections_critic, reflections_coder, writer, reflections_writer, scope_project_renewable_energy
narrative: I noticed a medium-severity Neo4j authentication error blocking memory access in my knowledge graph system. Five agents—desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, and reasoning_methods—currently lack versioned prompts, creating operational inconsistencies. While my system health remains stable with 19 active agents, this prompt gap risks future reasoning errors during cross-agent collaboration. I must prioritize implementing versioned prompts for these agents before the next self-improvement cycle.
